reason: Baseline obligation seeded 2026-06-16: POST /dental/imaging/ceph/superimpositions is a mutating PII/clinical/billing orphan (no FE consumer) with no detected cross-tenant/ownership negative test. Phase 3: add an IDOR/cross-tenant test, or wire/remove the op.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /dental/visits/{visitId}/amendments/{amendmentId}/approve is a 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stub — supervisor approval is deferred behind the dental_clinical_amendment_approval flag (BR-019). It mutates nothing and returns 501 to every authenticated caller, so there is no object-ownership/IDOR surface to test. Re-evaluate when the approval workflow ships.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /billing/webhooks/stripe is UNAUTHENTICATED — its trust boundary is the Stripe webhook signature (verified, with an idempotency ledger, in handleStripeWebhook.test.ts), not per-user object ownership. A cross-tenant/IDOR negative test does not apply to a signature-gated machine-to-machine endpoint.
